uid.description: The unique identifier (UID) of the payment gateway.

app_uid.description: The UID of the app that owns the gateway.

gateway_name.description: The name of the payment gateway must match the application name (case sensitive).

gateway_logo_url.description: The URL or path to the logo of the gateway.

active.description: Indicates if the payment gateway is active and available for use.

created_at.description: The date and time the payment gateway was created.

updated_at.description: The date and time the payment gateway was last updated.

key_gateway_benefits.description: A clear 3-4 bullet list highlighting the unique features and value of the gateway, aimed at encouraging merchants to connect with it. This information is stored per language.

language.description: The language code (e.g., en, fr, es).

benefits.description: A list of benefits in the specified language.

quick_benefit_highlights.description: A brief, 2-4 word version of the gateway benefits, tailored for compact displays or mobile interfaces. This information is stored per language.

language.description: The language code (e.g., en, fr, es).

highlights.description: A list of short benefit highlights in the specified language.

supported_countries.description: The list of countries supported by the payment gateway.

supported_currencies.description: A list of currencies supported by the payment gateway.

minimum_value_to_charge.description: The minimum value that can be charged using the payment gateway.

payment_methods.description: The payment methods supported by the gateway.

credit_card.description: Indicates if the gateway supports credit card payments.

ach.description: Indicates if the gateway supports ACH payments.

processing_features.description: The features the payment gateway supports and their current state (enabled/disabled).

multi_currency.description: Indicates if the gateway supports multi-currency transactions.

back_office_charge.description: Indicates if the gateway supports charging from the back office.

checkout.description: Indicates whether the payment gateway supports a checkout option initiated from the client portal.

refund.description: Indicates if the gateway supports full online refunds.

partial_refund.description: Indicates if the gateway supports partial online refunds. Requires full refunds to be enabled.

save_card_by_client_on_payment_flow.description: Indicates if clients can save cards on file during a payment flow.

save_card_by_client_standalone_flow.description: Indicates if clients can save cards on file through a standalone flow.

save_card_by_business.description: Indicates if the gateway supports saving cards on file from the business side.

benefits: Acepta pagos de más de 195 países
